user.title: Ontario Energy Pricing Setup
user.description:
Configure your Ontario Energy Pricing integration.

This integration fetches real-time data directly from IESO (Independent Electricity System Operator):
- Current LMP (Locational Marginal Price) - updated every 5 minutes
- Global Adjustment
- Total Rate (LMP + GA + Admin Fee)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ontario Energy Pricing
reconfigure.description: Update your Ontario Energy Pricing settings.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to IESO - check network connectivity

abort.already_configured: Ontario Energy Pricing is already configured for {location}. Remove the existing config to add a new one.

init.title: Configure Ontario Energy Pricing
init.description: Adjust your energy pricing settings. Check 'Add cheapest window' to create a new binary sensor, or select one to remove.

add_window.title: Add Cheapest Hours Sensor
add_window.description: Create a binary sensor that turns ON during the X cheapest forecast hours. Useful for scheduling pool pumps, EV chargers, or appliances.

remove_window.title: Remove Cheapest Hours Sensor
remove_window.description: Are you sure you want to remove the '{name}' sensor?

error.name_duplicate: A sensor with this name already exists

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Manually refresh all sensor data from IESO

xml_parse_error.message: Failed to parse IESO XML response. The IESO data feed may be temporarily unavailable.

lmp_fetch_error.message: Failed to fetch IESO LMP data. Check your network connection to IESO.

ieso_connection_error.message: Cannot connect to IESO servers. Verify your internet connection.
